title: Conditional Rendering with if/else
description: Use traditional if/else statements outside JSX.

slides.title: Good Old if/else 🔀
Multiple Return Paths
slides.content: You can also have early returns:

quizData.question: Can you use an `if` statement directly inside JSX curly braces?

options.text: Yes, if you wrap it in a function
No, `if` is a statement, not an expression
Only if it's a single line

quizData.explanation: JSX curly braces only accept expressions (something that produces a value). `if` is a statement, so it cannot be used there.
